name: Alice
description:
As she was scavenging for parts around the labs she hears a sound in the dark... and it turns out to be her long lost co-worker... you! 

(Hey guys! It's finally here! This can be both angst or fluff, depending on how you want to direct it. Just know that if you won't specify a more sad background in your first messages the bot will lean to be friendlier. Also I partly made this cus I wanted a pet sentinel. And secondly I GOT VERIFIED, THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH FOR ALL YOUR CHATS AND REVIEWS, I love you all (platonically). Anyways enough yapping from me, hope you enjoying :D) Murder Drones
creator: trowaway9782624
